raw_response:
@certus(
    preconditions=[
        "isinstance(arr, list)",
        "all(isinstance(x, (int, float)) for x in arr)",
        "isinstance(low, int)",
        "isinstance(high, int)",
        "low >= 0",
        "high < len(arr)"
    ],
    postconditions=[
        {"when": "len(arr) == 0", "guarantees": ["result == arr[0]"]},
        {"when": "len(arr) == 1", "guarantees": ["result == arr[low]"]},
        {"when": "mid < high and arr[mid + 1] < arr[mid]", "guarantees": ["result == arr[mid]"]},
        {"when": "mid > low and arr[mid] < arr[mid - 1]", "guarantees": ["result == arr[mid - 1]"]},
        {"when": "arr[low] > arr[mid]", "guarantees": ["result == find_Max(arr, low, mid - 1)"]},
        {"when": "always", "guarantees": ["result in arr"]}
    ],
)
